props.name: children
props.description: The text content to display inside the fuzzy text component.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: Specifies the font family of the text. 'inherit' uses the computed style from the parent.

props.name: enableHover
props.description: Enables the hover effect for the fuzzy text.

props.name: baseIntensity
props.description: The fuzz intensity when the text is not hovered.

props.name: hoverIntensity
props.description: The fuzz intensity when the text is hovered.

props.name: fuzzRange
props.description: Maximum pixel displacement for the fuzzy effect.

props.name: fps
props.description: Frame rate cap for the animation. Lower values reduce CPU usage.

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: Number of frames to ease between intensity states for smooth transitions.

props.name: clickEffect
props.description: Enables a momentary burst of maximum intensity on click.

props.name: glitchMode
props.description: Enables periodic random intensity spikes for a glitch effect.

props.name: glitchInterval
props.description: Milliseconds between glitch bursts when glitchMode is enabled.

props.name: glitchDuration
props.description: Milliseconds duration of each glitch burst.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the canvas element.
